name: Google Flights MCP Server
what_it_does: MCP server for searching Google Flights data — enabling AI agents to search for flight options, compare prices, check availability, and retrieve flight information. Enables travel research, trip planning, and itinerary building workflows through AI-assisted flight search.
use_cases: Searching flight options and prices from travel planning agents
Comparing flight routes and costs for itinerary building agents
Monitoring flight price changes from travel deal agents
Integrating flight search into AI-driven travel booking workflows
not_for: Actual flight booking without human confirmation (search-only tool)
Commercial travel aggregation without Google ToS compliance
Real-time airline inventory (search data may have delays)
best_when: A travel planner or business traveler wants AI agents to search and compare flights — researching options without switching between browsers and search tools.
avoid_when: You need actual flight booking capabilities. This is search/research only — not a booking engine. Verify Google Flights ToS compliance for your use case.

auth.notes: May use Google Flights web data or SerpAPI — verify auth requirements of underlying data source.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Depends on underlying data source (SerpAPI has free tier limits)
pricing.paid_tiers: SerpAPI or similar if used as backend
pricing.notes: MCP server is free open source. May require SerpAPI or similar for flight data — check implementation.

performance.rate_limits: Google Flights or SerpAPI rate limits

known_agent_gotchas: Google Flights data via web scraping may violate Google ToS — verify implementation uses approved API
Flight prices change rapidly — search results represent a snapshot, not guaranteed pricing
No booking capability — agents must direct users to complete booking through official channels
Community tool — verify data freshness and accuracy before building travel workflows on it
agent_readiness.security_notes: Flight search data. Review Google Flights ToS for automated querying. No credentials if using public endpoint. No personal data unless integrated with booking.

security_score_components.security_notes: Review ToS for flight data source. HTTPS. No personal data for search-only use.
